tools.name: reminders_create
tools.description: Create a new reminder in the Reminders app.

due_date.description: Optional due date (e.g. 'March 10, 2026 at 9:00 AM'). Omit for no due date.

notes.description: Optional additional notes for the reminder

invoke.script:
tell application "Reminders"
  set newReminder to make new reminder at end of reminders of default list with properties {name:"{{title}}"}
  if "{{due_date}}" is not "" then
    set due date of newReminder to date "{{due_date}}"
  end if
  if "{{notes}}" is not "" then
    set body of newReminder to "{{notes}}"
  end if
  return "Reminder created: {{title}}"
end tell

tools.name: reminders_list_incomplete
tools.description: List all incomplete reminders from the default list.

invoke.script:
tell application "Reminders"
  set incompleteList to {}
  set pending to reminders of default list whose completed is false
  if pending is {} then return "No incomplete reminders."
  repeat with r in pending
    copy name of r to end of incompleteList
  end repeat
  return incompleteList as string
end tell

tools.name: reminders_complete
tools.description: Mark a reminder as completed by name.

title.description: Title of the reminder to mark complete

invoke.script:
tell application "Reminders"
  set matches to reminders of default list whose name contains "{{title}}" and completed is false
  if matches is {} then return "No incomplete reminder found matching: {{title}}"
  set completed of first item of matches to true
  return "Marked complete: " & name of first item of matches
end tell

tell application "Reminders"
  set listNames to {}
  repeat with l in lists
    copy name of l to end of listNames
  end repeat
  return listNames as string
end tell
